summary: Health.OrphanSKUs now counts distinct (Kind, ID) SKUs instead of (SKU, bad-ref) pairs, so a SKU in two inactive categories contributes 1 to the rollup, not 2.
reason: Greptile review (PR #576): the orphan-skus command still emits one row per bad reference (agents need to see every broken assignment), but the health report is the agent-priming signal and over-reporting drives redundant fix attempts in automated pipelines.
validated_outcome: go build, go vet, go test ./internal/pricebook/ all clean
